name: Pride Transportation Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: contracts with at least five Minnesota schools/districts (Twin Cities metro)
recent_news: KSTP 5 Investigates (circa 2024-2025) reported alarming safety record: ~60% of MN DPS inspections failed vs. 10% state avg; 40+ buses pulled from service; missing-bus incident with elementary students. Registration noted outdated in FMCSA snapshot.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~38 buses) independent Twin Cities operator, intrastate-only. Severe safety/compliance issues and possible regulatory exposure make this a HIGH-RISK tuck-in; would require deep diligence and likely route-only/asset acquisition, not stock deal.

name: Harford County Sch Bus Contrs
districts_or_customers: Harford County Public Schools (HCPS) - contractor-owned bus serving general ed routes
recent_news: HCPS uses 408 contractor-owned/operated general-ed buses plus 129 county-owned SPED buses to transport ~32,000 students daily; Harford County School Bus Contractors Association advocates collectively for ~50+ small family contractors on insurance/rate matters (2021 testimony).
fit_notes: Name appears to be a small individual HCPS contractor (single-bus/family operator) at 3762 Level Village Rd, Forest Hill. Owner not identified in public records; could be confused with the HCPS Contractors Association. Harford County uses a fragmented owner-operator model — potential roll-up play across the ~50 small contractors, but each is tiny (1-5 buses).

name: Green School Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Los Angeles / Compton area schools (specifics not public)
recent_news: CA domestic stock corp (entity C4575098) incorporated March 5, 2020; street address 10352 Gramercy Pl, Riverside CA 92505, mailing P.O. Box 4757 Compton. NOTE: Compton USD's primary student-transport contractor is Durham School Services (Summit/National Express) — Green School Transportation is a small independent, not Durham.
fit_notes: Very young (2020) sub-scale LA-basin operator with single-digit revenue ($0.6M) and ~12 employees. Too small for direct tuck-in but could be a no-cost route consolidation. Note: Compton USD itself is already served by Summit/Durham — limited incremental geography.

name: Ocean Transportation & Rental
recent_news: Listed at 90 Broadway, Lawrence MA 01840 / (978) 965-2265; categorized in directories as trucking/motor freight and transportation. Public school-bus contract footprint with Lawrence Public Schools not confirmed in available sources.
fit_notes: Identity unclear — name 'Ocean Transportation & Rental' at 90 Broadway, Lawrence may overlap with Ocean Transportation Inc. (North Shore livery/shuttle for elderly clients) rather than a true school-bus contractor. Likely a hybrid livery/van operator rather than yellow-bus fleet. Low priority tuck-in until service mix confirmed.

name: Palmer Bus Svc Of Lakeview Inc
owner_or_parent: Palmer Bus Service, Inc. (parent — family-owned, MN)
districts_or_customers: Lakeview School District #2167 (Cottonwood, MN K-12) — ~500 students daily
recent_news: Cottonwood/Lakeview division of Palmer Bus Service operating since 2006. Parent Palmer Bus Service (founded 1974 by Floyd & Lois Palmer in St. Clair, MN; transitioned in 2012 to daughters Hollie Johnson and Jenna Fromm) runs ~500+ buses/vans across 22-28 MN/WI divisions, transporting ~38,000 students/day — 36th largest privately run bus company in U.S. Won 2024 NSTA award for alt-fuel testing.
fit_notes: This is a single rural-MN division of the much larger Palmer Bus Service platform — not a standalone tuck-in. Real opportunity is the PARENT (Palmer Bus Service, Inc., ~500 buses, 28 MN/WI districts, 2nd-gen family ownership) which would be a strategic regional acquisition, not a tuck-in. Succession signal low (2nd gen actively running it as of 2024), but Palmer is exactly the kind of family platform Summit/I Squared would target.
